mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM CAREER_DIAGNOSIS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY DIAGNOSIS_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT CAREER_DIAGNOSIS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CAREER_DIAGNOSIS ( DIAGNOSIS_ID, USER_ID, LLM_SUMMARY, LEVEL_TEST_BUILD_STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{diagnosisId}, #{userId}, #{llmSummary, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{levelTestBuildStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO CAREER_TARGET_SKILL ( TARGET_SKILL_ID, DIAGNOSIS_ID, SKILL_ID, USER_SET_SKILL_LEVEL ) VALUES ( CAREER_TARGET_SKILL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{diagnosisId}, #{skillId}, #{userSetSkillLevel} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEVEL_TEST_ANSWER_LOG al JOIN LEVEL_TEST_QUESTION q ON al.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID = q.LEVEL_QUESTION_ID WHERE q.DIAGNOSIS_ID = #{diagnosisId}
SELECT SKILL_ID AS skillId, SKILL_NAME AS skillName, PARENT_SKILL_ID AS parentSkillId, SKILL_TYPE AS skillType FROM SKILL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SKILL_TYPE, SKILL_NAME

SELECT c.COURSE_ID AS courseId, c.CATEGORY_TYPE AS categoryType, c.COURSE_TYPE AS courseType, c.COURSE_TITLE AS courseTitle, c.INSTRUCTOR_NAME AS instructorName, c.THUMBNAIL_URL AS thumbnailUrl, CASE WHEN c.COURSE_TYPE = 'ONLINE' THEN CASE WHEN onc.STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN '서비스 종료' ELSE '상시 수강 가능' END WHEN c.COURSE_TYPE = 'OFFLINE' THEN CASE WHEN ofc.STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN '폐강' WHEN SYSDATE < ofc.APPLY_START_DATE THEN '모집 대기' WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN ofc.APPLY_START_DATE AND ofc.APPLY_END_DATE THEN '모집 중' WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN ofc.APPLY_END_DATE AND ofc.COURSE_START_DATE THEN '모집 마감' WHEN SYSDATE BETWEEN ofc.COURSE_START_DATE AND ofc.COURSE_END_DATE THEN '강의 진행 중' WHEN SYSDATE > ofc.COURSE_END_DATE THEN '강의 종료' ELSE '상태 불명' END ELSE '유형 오류' END AS virtualStatus FROM CAREER_RECOMMENDATION cr JOIN COURSE c ON cr.COURSE_ID = c.COURSE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ONLINE_COURSE onc ON c.COURSE_ID = onc.COURSE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN OFFLINE_COURSE ofc ON c.COURSE_ID = ofc.COURSE_ID WHERE cr.DIAGNOSIS_ID = #{diagnosisId} AND ( (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'ONLINE' AND NVL(onc.STATUS, 'OPEN') != 'HIDDEN') OR (c.COURSE_TYPE = 'OFFLINE' AND NVL(ofc.STATUS, 'OPEN') != 'HIDDEN') ) ORDER BY c.CREATED_AT DESC, c.COURSE_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limitPlusOne} ROWS ONLY
